MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Oct-24-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEAARANCES - ATTY. ALEX G. TOVARIAN, TEL. NO. 984-9990, MOVING PARTY;
ATTY. NEVIN C. BROWNFIELD OF ONGARO/BURTT & LOUDERBACK, TEL. NO. 433-3900, MOVING PAARTY.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: ONGARO, BURTT & LOUDERBACK LLP'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD FOR PLAINTIFF IS Denied without prejudice of refiling to show good cause by filing new motion to withdraw. Notwithstanding the lack of any opposition to the motion. The motion papers, without more, fails to provide good cause to withdraw as counsel. The claimed 'irreconcilable differences' is not explained and cannot be presumed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077 =(302/HEK)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Oct-24-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEAARANCES - ATTY. ALEX G. TOVARIAN, TEL. NO. 984-9990, MOVING PARTY;
ATTY. NEVIN C. BROWNFIELD OF ONGARO/BURTT & LOUDERBACK, TEL. NO. 433-3900, MOVING PAARTY.

RULING - A R G U E D; ALEKSEY TOVARIAN'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD FOR PLAINTIFF is Denied without prejudice of refiling to show good cause by filing new motion to withdraw. Notwithstanding the lack of any opposition to the motion, the motion papers, without more, fails to provide good cause to withdraw as counsel. The claimed 'irreconcilable differences' is not explained and cannot be presumed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077 =(302/HEK)
